positive: A vibrant, stylized graphic illustration of a whimsical forest scene at sunset. The composition features a central grouping of highly detailed flora, including oversized mushrooms, intertwined ferns, and delicate glowing vines. The style is retro-pop art meets Alphonse Mucha's elegance, using thick, clean linework and flat color blocking for maximum print readability. Emphasize deep forest greens, vibrant magentas, and glowing amber accents. Strong, directional backlighting makes the subjects pop against a gradient sky of deep indigo and soft coral. Clean silhouette focus, vector art quality, designed for apparel printing, central symmetrical composition.
negative: blurry, noise, text, signature, watermark, logo, low detail, bad anatomy, extra limbs, abstract, photorealistic, cinematic, grainy, deep shadows
